---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Corex
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Corex to do. If it touches the framework, note which layer (core, blocks, forms,
config, a block, the CLI, the theme tokens).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one is better.

## Spec Kit note

Non-trivial features go through the Spec Kit flow (specify → clarify → plan → tasks → implement).
If you can sketch the user story and acceptance criteria here, it speeds that up.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, mockups, links.
